title: Purpose
doc_html:
§1248.2. Purpose

            The purpose of this Subpart is to generate revenue by collecting from certain institutional providers a local hospital assessment payment to be used to provide the nonfederal share of a Medicaid payment program directly benefitting the residents of a parish.

            Acts 2020, No. 330, §1.
doc_text:
§1248.2.  Purpose
The purpose of this Subpart is to generate revenue by collecting from certain
institutional providers a local hospital assessment payment to be used to provide the
nonfederal share of a Medicaid payment program directly benefitting the residents of a
parish.
Acts 2020, No. 330, §1.
